lines.text: ASC 842 lessee lease cost: operating lease cost $298,000,000; variable lease cost $54,000,000; short-term lease cost $8,000,000; Total lease cost $360,000,000 per ASC 842 842-20-50-4(a), 842-20-50-4(b), 842-20-50-4(c).
ASC 842 weighted-average remaining lease term and discount rate: operating leases 8.4 years at 4.25%; finance leases 12.7 years at 3.85% per ASC 842 842-20-50-4(g)(1), 842-20-50-4(g)(2).

ASC 842 lease maturity reconciliation: Operating leases — Y1 $980,000,000, Y2 $920,000,000, Y3 $860,000,000, Y4 $810,000,000, Y5 $760,000,000, thereafter $4,200,000,000; total undiscounted $8,530,000,000; less imputed interest $1,980,000,000; present value of lease liability $6,550,000,000. Finance leases — Y1 $145,000,000, Y2 $132,000,000, Y3 $118,000,000, Y4 $105,000,000, Y5 $92,000,000, thereafter $410,000,000; total undiscounted $1,002,000,000; less imputed interest $175,000,000; present value of lease liability $827,000,000. Reconciled to balance sheet operating lease liability $6,550,000,000 and finance lease liability $827,000,000 (diff $0). per ASC 842 842-20-50-6.
